title: Measurabl Launches Free Sustainability Software Solution, Onboards Over 92 Million Square Metres of Real Estate Within Weeks
author: Matt Ellis (Ceo And Co-Founder)
description: Measurabl launched a free sustainability data platform for real estate, enabling stakeholders to measure and manage property sustainability performance. Within four weeks, they onboarded 5,000 buildings across 32 countries, responding to industry disruption and investor demand for sustainability metrics.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Supportive of Measurabl's free solution and sees value in sustainability transparency

title: Is it Wise to Retain Boston Properties (BXP) Stock for Now?
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: Healthy demand for premier office spaces and long-term leases from tenants bode well for Boston Properties (BXP). However, elevated interest rates continue to be a concern.

title: 2 Very Overrated REITs And 2 Very Underrated REITs
author: Jussi Askola, CFA
description: Not all REITs are equally attractive. Some are overpriced. Others are undervalued. Read here for two overrated REITs and two better alternatives to consider.
